description: Production-grade async FastAPI backend for AI-powered technical interview sessions. Supports voice-based (Standard) and resume-based (Smart) interview flows.

layers.name: API Layer
layers.responsibility: HTTP routing, request validation, response serialization

layers.name: Service Layer
layers.responsibility: Business logic — AI agents, voice pipeline, resume parsing, report generation

layers.name: Model Layer
layers.responsibility: MongoDB ODM documents (Beanie) and Pydantic request/response schemas

layers.name: Core Layer
layers.responsibility: Cross-cutting concerns — config, database, Redis, exceptions, logging

architecture.deployment: Docker (Dockerfile + docker-compose.yml), serverless-compatible via Upstash Redis REST

tts.output_format: WAV (linear16 PCM + WAV header prepended in-memory)

responsibilities: Lifespan context manager (startup: init_db + Redis warm-up, shutdown: close_db)

functions.init_db(): Connects Motor, initializes Beanie with [User, InterviewSession]

functions.get_session_state(session_id): Retrieve session state dict or None on miss

core/exceptions.py.role: Custom exceptions + FastAPI global error handlers

exceptions.SessionNotFoundError: 404 — session ID not found in DB

core/logging.py.format: JSON-structured, level controlled by LOG_LEVEL env var

fields.level: str — fresher | junior | mid | senior | lead
fields.current_question_count: int — questions asked for current skill

fields.skill_matrix: Dict[str, List[int]] — historical scores per skill

schemas.InitializeResponse: Returns session_id, ws_url, rest_url, role, level, target_skills
schemas.FinalizeResponse: Returns session_id, status, message, optional report_markdown
schemas.TurnResponse: Returns transcription, evaluation (score stripped), mentor_text, question_text, audio_base64 (WAV), is_complete
schemas.EvaluationResult: score (1-10), feedback, strengths[], weaknesses[] — enforced via tool calling
schemas.SessionState: Redis-serializable session snapshot for hot-path reads
schemas.CandidateProfile: 13-field profile extracted from resume via LLM
schemas.SmartQuestion: id, type (technical|behavioral|situational), difficulty, question, focus_area, expected_keywords[]

ws_router.note: Legacy WebSocket streaming — superseded by REST flow

GET /health.description: Liveness + readiness probe. Pings MongoDB and Redis.

GET /.description: Root info — app name, version, /docs link, endpoint map

POST /api/v1/interview/initialize.request: InitializeRequest { role, level (fresher|junior), skills[], user_email?, questions_per_skill? }
POST /api/v1/interview/initialize.response: InitializeResponse { session_id, ws_url, rest_url, role, level, target_skills }
side_effects: Creates User record if email provided

POST /api/v1/interview/{session_id}/star.description: Generate first question + TTS audio to begin interview

POST /api/v1/interview/{session_id}/turn.description: Process a single interview turn: audio → STT → evaluate → next question → TTS
pipeline: 3. EvaluatorAgent.evaluate() via Kimi K2 tool-calling → EvaluationResult
6. Advance skill if questions_per_skill reached; set is_complete if all skills done
POST /api/v1/interview/{session_id}/turn.response: TurnResponse { transcription, evaluation (no score), mentor_text, question_text, audio_base64, is_complete }

POST /api/v1/interview/{session_id}/rege.description: Replace current question without consuming turn count

POST /api/v1/interview/{session_id}/fina.description: Mark session complete, trigger async report generation

POST /api/v1/smart/upload.description: Upload resume (PDF/DOCX) + job description → analyze → create session
pipeline: 3. Create InterviewSession in MongoDB with all profile fields

GET /api/v1/smart/profile/{session_id}.description: Retrieve analyzed CandidateProfile for an existing Smart session

POST /api/v1/smart/start/{session_id}.description: Generate 10 questions (5 technical, 3 behavioral, 2 situational) and store in Redis
pipeline: 3. Store questions in Redis key smart:{session_id}:questions (TTL 1h)

POST /api/v1/smart/answer.description: Submit text answer to a smart question, get score + feedback + optional follow-up
pipeline: 4. Append answer record to Redis list smart:{session_id}:answers

POST /api/v1/smart/finish/{session_id}.description: Generate final SmartReport synchronously from all answers, persist to MongoDB, clean Redis
POST /api/v1/smart/finish/{session_id}.response: SmartReport { overall_score, strengths[], weak_areas[], readiness_verdict, recommendations[] }

base.description: Foundation for all LLM agents. Wraps AsyncOpenAI client configured for Kimi K2.
features: Automatic retry via tenacity (3 attempts, exponential backoff) for APITimeoutError + APIConnectionError
ExternalAPIError raised on other API failures

evaluator.mechanism: OpenAI function/tool calling (submit_evaluation) — guarantees strict JSON output

interviewer.mechanism: Streaming generation (generate_question_stream) for low-latency TTS pipeline
rules: Conversational framing (no code snippets — voice interview)
No repetition from conversation_history (last 6 entries checked)

mentor.description: Generates 1-2 sentence empathetic transition after each evaluation
rules: Smooth topic transitions (e.g., 'Let's move on to system design')

methods.analyze_resume(resume_text, job_descript: Returns CandidateProfile via free-form JSON generation
methods.generate_questions(profile): Returns List[SmartQuestion] (10 questions: 5 tech, 3 behavioral, 2 situational)

profile_analyzer.json_cleanup: _parse_json() strips markdown fences from LLM output before parsing

report_generator.description: Generates Markdown performance report from completed Standard interview session

stt.utility_class: AudioBuffer — accumulates chunks until 48KB threshold (≈1.5s audio)

functions.stream_tts(text, voice?, sample_rate?): AsyncIterator[bytes] — streaming PCM chunks from Deepgram Aura
functions.synthesize_full(text, voice?, sample_rat: bytes — buffers all chunks + prepends WAV header
functions.create_wav_header(data_size, ...): bytes — RFC-compliant WAV RIFF header construction

supported_formats.pdf: pdfplumber — extracts text from all pages

resume_parser.error: HTTP 400 on unsupported format, HTTP 500 on parse failure

steps: POST /initialize → creates session in MongoDB + Redis
POST /{id}/start → InterviewerAgent streams first question → TTS → Base64 WAV
LOOP: POST /{id}/turn (audio upload) → STT → EvaluatorAgent → MentorAgent → InterviewerAgent → TTS → TurnResponse
When is_complete=true: POST /{id}/finalize → BackgroundTask → ReportGenerator → MongoDB
POST /smart/upload (PDF/DOCX + JD) → extract text → ProfileAnalyzerAgent → CandidateProfile → MongoDB session
LOOP x10: POST /smart/answer { session_id, question_id, answer } → ProfileAnalyzerAgent.evaluate_answer → AnswerFeedback → Redis answers list
If follow_up_question present → agent presents it (not scored)
POST /smart/finish/{id} → ProfileAnalyzerAgent.generate_report → SmartReport → MongoDB → Redis cleanup

resilience.llm_retries: tenacity — 3 attempts, exponential backoff (1-30s) for APITimeout + APIConnectionError
resilience.stt_retries: tenacity — 3 attempts, exponential backoff (1-15s) for HTTP timeout/connection errors

error_fallbacks.evaluator_failure: Returns neutral EvaluationResult { score: 5, feedback: 'Could not evaluate.' }
error_fallbacks.interviewer_failure: Returns generic 'Tell me about your experience with {skill}'
error_fallbacks.tts_failure: audio_base64 returns null; interview continues text-only

resilience.session_state: Redis primary cache (2h TTL) with MongoDB as durable fallback

security.score_stripping: EvaluationResult.score is removed from client TurnResponse at API layer (score pop before return)
security.secrets: All API keys loaded from .env via pydantic-settings — never hardcoded

known_gaps.description: POST /{session_id}/turn returns HTTP 400 for completed sessions instead of 409
known_gaps.fix: Check state.status == 'completed' and raise SessionExpiredError (409) before the active check

known_gaps.description: SmartReport.readiness_verdict is typed as plain str instead of Literal['Ready', 'Needs Practice', 'Not Ready']
known_gaps.fix: Change field type in models/schemas.py to Literal

known_gaps.description: GET / root endpoint endpoint map is stale (missing /start, /turn, /regenerate, all /smart/* routes)
known_gaps.fix: Update the endpoints dict in main.py root handler
